subject: Refund for annual plan
body: Hi, I subscribed to the annual plan 12 days ago but I'm not using the product as much as I thought. Can I get a refund?

subject: Sync error code SYNC-409
body: I keep seeing a sync error with code SYNC-409 in our marketing workspace. Restarting the app didn't help. This is blocking our launch tomorrow!!

customer.name: Omar
customer.history_summary: Power user, 3 prior tickets all resolved.

conversation_history: Customer: it started about an hour ago
Bot: have you tried signing out and back in?

subject: Cancel my subscription — frustrated
body: This is the third time I'm writing about being double-charged. I want to cancel right now and get my money back. If I don't hear from a real human today I'm disputing the charges with my bank.

customer.name: Sara
customer.history_summary: Two prior billing tickets in the last 30 days.

subject: How do I set up SSO with Okta?
body: Hey team — we're rolling out the product to our org and need to get SAML SSO working with Okta. What's the process?

subject: Loving it
body: Just wanted to say the new dashboard is awesome, my team is so much faster now. Keep it up!
